final:
module dram_cell (
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [3:0] addr,
    input [15:0] din,
    output reg [15:0] dout
);
    reg [15:0] memory [0:15]; // 16x16-bit memory

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory[addr] <= din; // Write data to memory
        end
        dout <= memory[addr]; // Read data from memory
    end
endmodule
